subject: A pale-haired elf figure in a dark cloak walking through a dim forest
description: A solitary elf figure with pale hair and pointed ears strides forward through a darkened forest. The figure wears a heavy dark cloak over a dark red or burgundy garment, walking directly toward the viewer. The forest behind is deep, shadowy, and atmospheric, with tall dark tree trunks receding into fog. The lighting is soft and diffuse, emanating from behind the figure's head, giving a subtle backlit quality to the pale hair. The mood is calm but purposeful, almost ominous.
foreground: Pale-haired elf in dark cloak walking forward
background: Dark misty forest with tall shadowed trees
emotion: purposeful, confident, slightly menacing forward stride
